channel.title: Preservation, Digital Technology & Culture (PDT&C)
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Preservation, Digital Technology & Culture (PDT&C)

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Temitope Oluwabunmi Mabawonku, Joshua Babatope, Pauline Chidimma Anyanwu, Ebunoluwa Boluwatife Akintunde DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/pdtc-2024-frontmatter4

item.title: Editor’s Note

item.title: The Interconnectedness of All Things: Understanding Digital Collections Through File Similarity
item.description: Article by Temitope Oluwabunmi Mabawonku, Joshua Babatope, Pauline Chidimma Anyanwu, Ebunoluwa Boluwatife Akintunde DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/pdtc-2024-0042

item.title: Inspiring Contributions: Fan Leaders’ Directives and Encouragement in the Chinese Online Celebrity Fan Community
item.description: Article by Temitope Oluwabunmi Mabawonku, Joshua Babatope, Pauline Chidimma Anyanwu, Ebunoluwa Boluwatife Akintunde DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/pdtc-2024-0025

item.title: Development of Customized Project Management Methodology for the Implementation of Online Archives Exhibitions: Insights and Evaluation from a Research and Development Organization
item.description: Article by Temitope Oluwabunmi Mabawonku, Joshua Babatope, Pauline Chidimma Anyanwu, Ebunoluwa Boluwatife Akintunde DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/pdtc-2024-0034

item.title: Digital Technology for Literature Revitalization: A Framework for Sindhi Libraries in India
item.description: Article by Temitope Oluwabunmi Mabawonku, Joshua Babatope, Pauline Chidimma Anyanwu, Ebunoluwa Boluwatife Akintunde DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/pdtc-2024-0030

item.title: The Impact of IT-Technologies on the Re-actualization and Research of a Once Forgotten Cultural Phenomenon: Ukrainian Epigraphic Embroidery in the Digital World
item.description: Article by Temitope Oluwabunmi Mabawonku, Joshua Babatope, Pauline Chidimma Anyanwu, Ebunoluwa Boluwatife Akintunde DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/pdtc-2024-0046

item.title: Strategizing IoT Platforms for Enhanced Hygrothermal Monitoring and Control in Libraries: A Transition from Passive to Proactive Operations
item.description: Article by Temitope Oluwabunmi Mabawonku, Joshua Babatope, Pauline Chidimma Anyanwu, Ebunoluwa Boluwatife Akintunde DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/pdtc-2024-0027

item.title: Adoption of Cloud Computing in Academic Libraries in Lagos and Ogun States
item.description: Article by Temitope Oluwabunmi Mabawonku, Joshua Babatope, Pauline Chidimma Anyanwu, Ebunoluwa Boluwatife Akintunde DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/pdtc-2024-0039
